public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as weather caller.
appearance: Corin Stone usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their weather caller status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In The Principalities, that reads as someone protocol-aware and boundary-sensitive, carrying overlapping laws, noble expectations, and shared imperial strain, and the habits of a weather caller still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of weather caller in and around Aurora Meadows, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Aurora Meadows workable through the obligations of weather caller while managing the immediate pressure of house rivalry in The Principalities.
hidden_pressure: Must stay useful at the seam where policy becomes ordinary consequence. Around Aurora Meadows, that usually means carrying house rivalry, guild legitimacy versus aristocratic legitimacy, magic restriction conflict without letting the role of weather caller visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Corin Stone can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Corin Stone can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
